problemStatement: Run the full test suite (go test ./... -count=1), fix any regressions in existing tests that assumed all languages produce full dimension sets or non-N/A grades, and ensure the build compiles cleanly.
userValue: Plan correctly scopes to fixing test regressions caused by the parent language-tier split, with minimal production changes (N/A handling, Swift cleanup) that are necessary to restore test integrity rather than introducing new features.
